author: Dr. Lizard
title: what cmv viral load threshold should trigger preemptive therapy after hsct?
answer: no universal threshold exists; most centers use 100-1000 iu/ml in plasma based on patient risk.
detail: ecil guidelines recommend 2-3 log10 iu/ml as common thresholds.
high-risk patients may warrant treatment at 100 iu/ml.
releaseNote: the optimal cmv viral load threshold for preemptive therapy after hsct is not universally agreed upon, with most centers using 100-1000 iu/ml in plasma based on patient risk.
